name: fix: Theme 4 a11y deep — carousel motion, skip-link, dead social, dead css class

tasks.name: carousel.js: prefers-reduced-motion guard + togglePause API + bind to #carousel-toggle
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'prefers-reduced-motion: reduce' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'matchMedia' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'togglePause\|isPaused' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'carousel-toggle' assets/js/carousel.js

tasks.name: carousel.css: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disable .phone-item transition
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -A3 'prefers-reduced-motion: reduce' assets/css/carousel.css | grep -q 'transition: none'

tasks.name: src/input.css: delete .phone-transition rule
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && ! grep -q '\.phone-transition' src/input.css

tasks.name: index.html: skip-link + main id + dead social spans + pause toggle button + remove phone-transition class
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'href="#main"' index.html && grep -qE '<main[^>]*id="main"' index.html && ! grep -q 'href="#!" aria-disabled="true"' index.html && [ "$(grep -cE 'aria-label="(Facebook|Instagram) \(sắp ra mắt\)"' index.html)" = '2' ] && grep -q 'id="carousel-toggle"' index.html && ! grep -q 'phone-item phone-transition' index.html

tasks.name: Legal pages (terms, privacy, community-standards): skip-link + main id
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && for f in terms privacy community-standards; do grep -q 'href="#main"' $f.html && grep -qE '<main[^>]*id="main"' $f.html || exit 1; done

tasks.name: Rebuild assets/css/styles.css via npm run build
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && npm run build && test -s assets/css/styles.css && ! grep -q 'phone-transition' assets/css/styles.css

tasks.name: Verify all REQs
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'matchMedia' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'prefers-reduced-motion' assets/css/carousel.css && grep -q 'href="#main"' index.html && for f in terms privacy community-standards; do grep -q 'href="#main"' $f.html || exit 1; done && ! grep -q 'phone-transition' src/input.css && ! grep -q 'phone-transition' assets/css/styles.css
